title: Ensure Deprecated Elements Have Both Annotation and Javadoc Tag
description: Deprecation should be marked with both the @Deprecated annotation and @deprecated Javadoc tag. This allows IDEs and other tools to warn about referencing deprecated elements. Furthermore, the tag can provide context about the deprecation, such as when it was deprecated, why, and how references should be refactored. Note: This rule does not apply to members and methods of a deprecated class or interface, but only to the classes and interfaces themselves.
recommendation: Add both the @Deprecated annotation and @deprecated Javadoc tag to the deprecated elements. Include details about the deprecation in the Javadoc tag.
impact: Improves code quality by warning users about deprecated elements and providing context about the deprecation.

checks.message: Add the missing @deprecated Javadoc tag alongside the @Deprecated annotation.
